title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - AT-4
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: AT-4 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control AT-4 in the Awareness and Training family. The control title for AT-4 is Training Records. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: CM-5 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, CM-5, belongs to the Configuration Management family and is titled Access Restrictions for Change. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
